metadata.description: High-risk desktop automation capabilities for bounded UI input and window management. Supports mouse clicks, text entry, key combinations, and strict window focus/move/minimize/maximize operations.
metadata.summary: Desktop automation for click, type, key, and strict window control with dry-run support.
metadata.author: Elegy Contributors

capabilities.name: Click
capabilities.description: Simulate a mouse click at screen coordinates. Supports left, right, or middle button and dry-run preview.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: X coordinate in screen pixels.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Y coordinate in screen pixels.

parameters.name: button
parameters.description: Mouse button: left, right, or middle.

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: When true, preview the action without injecting input.

output.description: ClickResult with coordinates, button, dry-run flag, target window evidence, and UTC timestamp.

capabilities.name: Type Text
capabilities.description: Inject Unicode text into the current foreground window. Supports dry-run preview.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Text to type.

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: When true, preview the action without injecting input.

output.description: TypeResult with typed text, character count, dry-run flag, target window evidence, and UTC timestamp.

capabilities.name: Send Key Combo
capabilities.description: Send a parsed key combination such as ctrl+s, alt+tab, or enter. Supports dry-run preview.

parameters.name: combo
parameters.description: Key combo string such as ctrl+s, alt+tab, enter, or ctrl+shift+f5.

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: When true, preview the action without injecting input.

output.description: KeyResult with combo, parsed keys, dry-run flag, target window evidence, and UTC timestamp.

capabilities.name: Focus Window
capabilities.description: Focus a single target window resolved by strict title matching or exact HWND. Supports dry-run preview.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Case-insensitive substring window title pattern. Must resolve to exactly one visible window when hwnd is omitted.

parameters.name: hwnd
parameters.description: Raw window handle. Takes priority over title matching when provided.

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: When true, preview the action without executing it.

output.description: WindowActionResult with resolved title, hwnd, dry-run flag, and UTC timestamp.

capabilities.name: Move Window
capabilities.description: Move a target window and optionally resize it, resolved by strict title matching or exact HWND. Supports dry-run preview.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Case-insensitive substring window title pattern. Must resolve to exactly one visible window when hwnd is omitted.

parameters.name: hwnd
parameters.description: Raw window handle. Takes priority over title matching when provided.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: Target X position in screen pixels.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Target Y position in screen pixels.

parameters.name: width
parameters.description: Optional new width in pixels.

parameters.name: height
parameters.description: Optional new height in pixels.

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: When true, preview the action without executing it.

output.description: WindowActionResult with resolved title, hwnd, dry-run flag, and UTC timestamp.

capabilities.name: Minimize Window
capabilities.description: Minimize a target window resolved by strict title matching or exact HWND. Supports dry-run preview.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Case-insensitive substring window title pattern. Must resolve to exactly one visible window when hwnd is omitted.

parameters.name: hwnd
parameters.description: Raw window handle. Takes priority over title matching when provided.

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: When true, preview the action without executing it.

output.description: WindowActionResult with resolved title, hwnd, dry-run flag, and UTC timestamp.

capabilities.name: Maximize Window
capabilities.description: Maximize a target window resolved by strict title matching or exact HWND. Supports dry-run preview.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Case-insensitive substring window title pattern. Must resolve to exactly one visible window when hwnd is omitted.

parameters.name: hwnd
parameters.description: Raw window handle. Takes priority over title matching when provided.

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: When true, preview the action without executing it.

output.description: WindowActionResult with resolved title, hwnd, dry-run flag, and UTC timestamp.

constraints.description: Desktop automation is Windows-only. On non-Windows platforms these capabilities fail with an unsupported error.

Win32 input injection and window control are bounded by Windows UIPI, integrity level, desktop/session boundaries, and foreground activation rules. Elevated or protected targets may reject input or focus changes.
All capabilities support dry-run mode for preview-only execution and evidence capture without injecting input or mutating window state.
Window-targeting commands use strict matching: title-based targeting must resolve to exactly one visible window or fail. Provide hwnd for precise targeting.

triggers.description: When an agent needs bounded mouse input.
When an agent needs bounded text entry.
When an agent needs bounded keyboard shortcut input.
When an agent needs to target and manage a specific desktop window.
